Title: Ruby and the Well
Writer: Brian J. Adams, LeeAnne H. Adams
Actors: Zoe Wiesenthal, Kristopher Turner, Lina Sennia
Plot: When her father inherits an overgrown orchard, Ruby O'Reilly discovers a magic well. She's been designated its new "keeper," and now it's up to her and her friends Mina and Sam to turn unfulfilled wishes into reality.
